next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/draw-io-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add BIND A record draw-io-a and CNAME draw → nginx-waf-a.home.example.invalid in hdc.example.invalid zone.
Add Cloudflare CNAME draw → waf.example.invalid (proxied) in example.invalid zone.
Configure nginx-waf sites[] with upstream http://<ct-ip>:8080 and client_ip cloudflare.
Browse https://draw.example.invalid after nginx-waf maintain issues the LE certificate.
